# agent-replay-debugger-mcp

> Agent Replay Debugger MCP — record every agent step + replay deterministically. Step-debugger for agentic loops. Audit-evidence signed exports. By MEOK AI Labs.

MCP server by MEOK AI Labs. Framework: fastmcp. Transport: stdio.

## Tools
- start_recording
- record_step
- replay_step
- timeline
- branch_from
- search_steps
- export_recording
- sign_recording

## Install
```
pip install agent-replay-debugger-mcp
```

## Links
- PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/agent-replay-debugger-mcp/
- Docs: https://meok.ai
